creator: roelof@nisser.com
text:
ports/security/rsaref/pkg/DESCR could benefit from the addition of
a line at the end telling non-US'ers where to go instead.

Fix: 

add for example the following:

"

If you are located outside the USA please use the librsaintl port instead.
"
How-To-Repeat: 
	

cat ports/security/rsaref/pkg/DESCR
